---
title: "Publications"
description: "Peer-reviewed publications by Weizheng Bai"
---

My research covers underground hydrogen storage, salt cavern engineering, renewable energy integration, and geotechnical safety. My name is shown in **bold**; an asterisk indicates the corresponding author as reported in my CV.

## First-author Publications

1. **Bai, W.**, Shi, X.*, Yang, C., et al. (2024). Assessment of the potential of salt mines for renewable energy peaking in China. *Energy*, 300, 131577. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.energy.2024.131577)

2. **Bai, W.**, Lu, J., Wang, J., et al. (2024). Numerical simulation study of salt cavern CO2 storage in a power-to-gas system. *Energies*, 17(22), 5786. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.3390/en17225786)

3. **Bai, W.**, Shi, X.*, Zhu, S., et al. (2025). Opportunities and challenges of large-scale salt cavern hydrogen storage in China coupled with renewable energy sources. *Clean Energy*, 9(1), 179-196. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1093/ce/zkae095)

4. **Bai, W.**, Shi, X.*, Zhu, S., Wei, X., & Huang, Y. (2025). Leakage risk assessment system for salt cavern hydrogen storage. *Deep Underground Science and Engineering*, 1-14. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1002/dug2.70011)

## Co-authored Publications

5. Wei, X., Shi, X.*, Ma, H., **Bai, W.**, et al. (2024). Oil storage and debrining process in insoluble sediment voids for underground salt cavern energy storage: An experimental study. *Geoenergy Science and Engineering*, 243, 213359. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.geoen.2024.213359)

6. Wang, J., Li, P., **Bai, W.**, et al. (2024). Mechanical behavior of sediment-type high-impurity salt cavern gas storage during long-term operation. *Energies*, 17(16), 3983. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.3390/en17163983)

7. Zhu, S., Shi, X., Yang, C., **Bai, W.**, et al. (2024). Site selection evaluation for salt cavern hydrogen storage in China. *Renewable Energy*, 224, 120143. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.renene.2024.120143)

8. Liu, X., Huang, Y., Shi, X., **Bai, W.**, et al. (2025). Offshore wind power-seawater electrolysis-salt cavern hydrogen storage coupling system: Potential and challenges. *Energies*, 18(1), 169. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.3390/en18010169)

## Profiles

- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-6673-3838)
- [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Weizheng-Bai-2)
